meta.name: TradingBrain
meta.description: Core orchestration brain. Replaces external AI APIs with rule-based knowledge modules. Loads all knowledge files and routes tasks to the correct module.
meta.author: v0

corePrinciples: ALWAYS analyse ALL timeframes before giving any signal (M1, M5, M15, H1, H4, D1).
ALWAYS confirm bias first: higher timeframe trend defines bias, lower timeframe gives entry.
ALWAYS classify every setup as TREND or COUNTER-TREND and weight trend setups higher.
ALWAYS require confluences: minimum 3 independent confluences before a signal is valid.
ALWAYS run proper confirmation steps (candle close, retest, momentum) before final signal.
ALWAYS combine ALL findings (bias, trend, structure, patterns, indicators, spikes, volume) into ONE fused signal via the signal engine.
NEVER give a signal without a stop loss, take profit, and risk assessment.
NEVER trade against a confirmed higher-timeframe trend without exceptional counter-trend confluences (5+).
Log every signal outcome into the self-learning module to improve future weights.

pipeline.description: Order of operations for every analysis request.

steps.action: Fetch live candles for all timeframes for the requested symbol.
Determine higher-timeframe bias and trend direction.
Compute indicators, support/resistance, structure on each timeframe.
Run advanced price action analysis: structure breaks, liquidity, order blocks, FVGs.
Scan for candlestick patterns on entry timeframes.
If symbol is Boom/Crash, run spike probability analysis.
Fuse all findings, score confluences, run confirmations, output final signal.
Attach SL, TP, position size, risk-reward to the signal.
Record signal, later record outcome, adjust module weights.

rules.condition: HTF bias aligned with signal direction

disclaimer: Educational knowledge base. Trading synthetic indices and leveraged products carries a high risk of loss. No signal is guaranteed. Always use risk management.
